label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking which month is usually not when people go rafting in the Grand Canyon. The options are June, February, October, or September. Looking at the text provided: The company mentions that most trips occur between April and October. So if most trips are from April to October, that means the months outside of this range are not typical. The options given are June (A), February (B), October (C), and September (D). Wait, October is included in the range (April to October), so October is a month when trips happen. So (C) is not the answer. September is within April-October, so (D) is also not the answer. June (A) is in that range, so (A) is not correct. February
